rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency guarantees
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
